text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... hehe. I saved myself from falling over this
time!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I know it has something to do with me getting in
some good rest yesterday. Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she's got enough energy to hold
herself steady.
